startPoint.en: Talk to Rat Burgiss south of Varrock.
startPoint.es: Habla con Rat Burgiss, al sur de Varrock.

items.name: Chaos rune
items.display: 15 chaos runes or 15 pure essence (unnoted, so it's recommended to bring the stackable chaos runes, or store the essence in some pouches)

items.name: Chaos altar
items.display: Access to the chaos altar (requiring any item that acts as the chaos talisman, for example a wicked hood having consumed the talisman, or travelling through the Abyss)

recommended.name: Mining
recommended.display: 42 Mining and Enter the Abyss (miniquest) (only if you use the Tunnel of Chaos to get to the chaos altar)

recommended.name: Varrock Teleport
recommended.display: Varrock Teleports would be useful. Teleport tablets may also be used.

recommended.name: Varrock lodestone
recommended.display: Varrock lodestone is very useful as it is just north of Rat Burgiss.

rewards.name: Tunnel of Chaos
rewards.display: Access to the Tunnel of Chaos, which provides a shortcut to the Chaos altar and the Chaos Tunnels

rewards.name: Historian Minas
rewards.display: Ability to speak with Historian Minas in the Varrock Museum and give him the Dagon'hai history book you found during the quest in the Varrock Palace library for 5 kudos.

rewards.name: Alternative Root
rewards.display: Alternative Root (In the Tunnel of Chaos)

rewards.name: Complication
rewards.display: Complication (In the Chaos altar - only unlocked if one has not visited it before)

rewards.name: Surok's Theme
rewards.display: Surok's Theme (In fight with King Roald)

text.en: Talk to Rat Burgiss, south-east of the Varrock lodestone by the crossroads to Lumbridge.
text.es: Habla con Rat Burgiss, al sureste de la piedra de viaje de Varrock, junto al cruce hacia Lumbridge.

chatOptions: 3 Shall I get them back for you?

text.en: Immediately west of the Grand Exchange is a camp. Kill 5 outlaws there.
text.es: Inmediatamente al oeste del Grand Exchange hay un campamento. Mata a 5 forajidos allí.

text.en: Take all 5 Rat's papers that they drop.
text.es: Coge los 5 papeles de Rat que sueltan.

text.en: Use the 5 papers on an empty folder.
text.es: Usa los 5 papeles en una carpeta vacía.

text.en: Go to the Varrock palace library, and talk to Surok Magis.
text.es: Ve a la biblioteca del palacio de Varrock y habla con Surok Magis.

text.en: Optional: search the bookcase south of the telescope in the north-east section of the room for the Dagon'hai History; it can be turned in to Historian Minas after the quest for 5 kudos.
text.es: Opcional: busca en la estantería al sur del telescopio, en la sección noreste de la sala, la Dagon'hai History; se puede entregar a Historian Minas tras la misión a cambio de 5 puntos de reconocimiento.

text.en: Use any method to enter the chaos altar.
text.es: Usa cualquier método para entrar en el altar del caos.

text.en: With 15 chaos runes, use the wand on the altar.
text.es: Con 15 runas de caos, usa la varita en el altar.

text.en: If you brought essence instead, craft the runes now.
text.es: Si has traído esencia en su lugar, crea las runas ahora.

text.en: Give Surok Magis a bowl and the infused wand.
text.es: Dale a Surok Magis un cuenco y la varita imbuida.

chatOptions: 1 I have the things you wanted!
1 Yes! I have a letter for you.

text.en: Talk to Zaff, in his shop north-west of Varrock Square.
text.es: Habla con Zaff, en su tienda al noroeste de Varrock Square.

text.en: Attack King Roald, and right-click summon with the beacon ring when he has 1 life point remaining.
text.es: Ataca a King Roald y, cuando le quede 1 punto de vida, haz clic derecho para invocar con el beacon ring.

text.en: After the cutscene, return to Rat Burgiss.
text.es: Tras la escena cinemática, vuelve con Rat Burgiss.
